final:
module top_module(
    output X      ,
    input  A      ,
    input  SLEEP_B,
    input  VPWR   ,
    input  VGND   ,
    input  VPB    ,
    input  VNB
);assign X = A & ~SLEEP_B;

  always @(*) begin
    if (1'b0) begin
      X <= VPWR; if (SLEEP_B) begin X <= VGND; end
    end
  end

endmodule

params_used.custom_dead_stmts: X <= VPWR; if (SLEEP_B) begin X <= VGND; end
